name: VenHub Global, Inc.
business: VenHub Global, Inc. sells fully autonomous robotic Smart Stores that use AI, sensors, and robotics to provide a 24/7 self-service shopping experience. The company generates revenue from the sale of Smart Stores to independent store owners and from product sales at company-owned locations. It also plans to offer SaaS and maintenance services in the future.

exposures.sentence: At present, our deployed AI and machine learning systems are focused on operational functions such as product verification through computer vision, robotic navigation, and predictive maintenance of hardware.

Our Version 1 Smart Stores are currently available and include autonomous robotic systems for product selection, bagging, and delivery; inventory tracking and restocking alerts; a mobile application for browsing and purchasing; and store owner access to basic operational analytics.
By utilizing advanced sensors, artificial intelligence (AI), and robotics, VenHub currently delivers a smooth and autonomous shopping experience, focused on accuracy, efficiency, and reliability.

At present, our deployed AI and machine learning systems are focused on operational functions such as product verification through computer vision, robotic navigation, and predictive maintenance of hardware.

Like others, we are also subject to significant system or network disruptions from numerous causes, including computer viruses and other cyber-attacks, facility access issues, new system implementations and energy blackouts.

catalysts.sentence: The Company was quoted on the Nasdaq Stock Market beginning on January 30, 2026, under the symbol VHUB .
